programme.title: Jimmy Neutron: Boy Genius
programme.desc: In the dark of night aliens fly their war ships to earth and abduct all the parents in Jimmy’s hometown of Retroville. So it’s up to Jimmy to rescue the abducted parents.

programme.title: Hey Arnold! The Movie
programme.desc: A heartless industrialist has an evil plan: to level Arnold's neighborhood and build a huge shopping mall. With time running out, someone needs to save the day. And that someone is Arnold.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Masters of Spinjitzu
programme.desc: With Destiny’s Bounty impounded, the police hire Ronin to track down the fugitive ninja. Misako has been arrested and is confronted by Nadakhan, who reveals he has trapped Wu in the Teapot of Tyrahn.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Masters of Spinjitzu
programme.desc: With the ninja imprisoned, Nadakhan uses the Realm Crystal to free his old crew. The ninja encounter Captain Soto, the first captain of the Destiny’s Bounty, who tells them the story of how he originally trapped Nadakhan in the Teapot.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Masters of Spinjitzu
programme.desc: The secret, he says, is the venom of a Tiger Widow, a rare creature that lives on only one island. The venom can slow a djinn down. Soto is the only one who knows where the island is and will only tell if the ninja breaks him out of jail.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Masters of Spinjitzu
programme.desc: Nadakhan vows revenge on the ninja and NINJAGO. The ninja and Soto escape from jail, only to find out the map to the island is on Nadakhan’s ship. Nadakhan discovers that Nya looks just like Delara, his long-lost love.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Masters of Spinjitzu
programme.desc: The ninja’s search for Nadakhan’s ship turns up nothing. Nadakhan’s crew is struggling to handle an airship that used to sail only on the oceans. Nadakhan confronts Jay and talks him into making a wish that will win him Nya.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Masters of Spinjitzu
programme.desc: Jay reveals to Cole that he made two wishes with Nadakhan. Large chunks of NINJAGO City are disappearing without a trace. The ninja find the Tiger Widow Island on the map but it is an island that exists on no other chart or database.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Masters of Spinjitzu
programme.desc: Jay is trapped on Nadakhan’s ship, as Nadakhan tries to force him to make his third wish. Lloyd, Cole, and Nya are marooned on Tiger Widow Island.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Masters of Spinjitzu
programme.desc: The ninja are trying to figure out a way to save Jay from Nadakhan’s ship. Two screenwriters, Kevin and Dan, suggest that they build a fake raid zeppelin and disguise themselves as Sky Pirates.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Masters of Spinjitzu
programme.desc: Jay and Nya have been holed up at the police precinct, but the Sky Pirates track him down. They flee by boat to the lighthouse where Zane’s father was once held captive. Nadakhan learns that the ninja still have the Tiger Widow venom.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Masters of Spinjitzu
programme.desc: Master Wu mistakenly tries to single-handedly complete a battle he began decades ago against Acronix, one of the twin Hands of Time.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Masters of Spinjitzu
programme.desc: The Ninja learn more about the Krux and Acronix – the two fallen Elemental Masters known as the Hands of Time – and are sure that this threat has finally been eliminated.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Masters of Spinjitzu
programme.desc: Kai's investigation of a Vermillion Warrior Helmet leads him to discover that Krux is alive and well in Ninjago, living under an assumed identity.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Masters of Spinjitzu
programme.desc: In the midst of an epidemic of mysterious metal thefts by the Vermillion Warriors, Lloyd realizes that stepping up and taking over for the ailing Master Wu is not an easy task.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Masters of Spinjitzu
programme.desc: While the Ninja fight to save MegaMonster Amusement Park, Jay struggles to defend his family's home from the Vermillion Warriors.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Masters of Spinjitzu
programme.desc: The Ninja celebrate their escape from the Vermillion Army and their retrieval of the Emerald Time Blade, but with Acronix and Krux determined to get their Blade back, the Airjitzu Temple becomes a battleground.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Masters of Spinjitzu
programme.desc: Secrets are revealed as Nya confronts the Samurai X imposter, Kai pursues the truth about his parents and the other Ninja desperately seek to locate and rescue Master Wu. But as usual, some answers only lead to more questions.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Masters of Spinjitzu
programme.desc: Kai confronts his dad for aiding the Hands of Time, only to discover that his parents are actually Acronix and Krux's captives.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Masters of Spinjitzu
programme.desc: The Hands of Time blackmail Kai and Nya into using their combined Elemental powers to retrieve the fourth and final Time Blade from the Boiling Sea with the promise that the siblings can use its reversal power to save the quickly-fading Master Wu.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Masters of Spinjitzu
programme.desc: Kai and Nya stow away aboard Krux and Acronix’s time-traveling snake mech in a desperate attempt to save Master Wu. But when they arrive in the past, they must help the Elemental Masters prevent the Hands of Time from re-writing Ninjago history.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Masters of Spinjitzu
programme.desc: When an unknown criminal syndicate threatens the Royal Family, the Ninja are called back into action and must protect the royal princess and a fabled artifact that may hold supernatural powers.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Masters of Spinjitzu
programme.desc: In the wake of a vicious attack upon the palace, the Sons of Garmadon steal the second Oni Mask, and the ninja invite the royal princess, Harumi, into their makeshift family.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Masters of Spinjitzu
programme.desc: While Princess Harumi adjusts to life with the ninja, Lloyd and Jay search for answers about the Oni Masks, while Cole and Zane attempt to infiltrate the Sons of Garmadon.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Masters of Spinjitzu
programme.desc: In order to join the Sons of Garmadon, Zane (aka Snake Jaguar) participates in a deadly motorcycle initiation race.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Masters of Spinjitzu
programme.desc: Zane’s near demise at the hands of Mr. E forces the ninja to flee aboard the Bounty, where they discover that a transmission Zane intercepted may reveal the hidden location of the Quiet One.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Masters of Spinjitzu
programme.desc: As Lloyd and Harumi venture deep into Primeval’s Eye in search of the third Oni Mask, the ninja attempt to fix the Bounty and make a startling discovery.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Masters of Spinjitzu
programme.desc: As Lloyd and Harumi search the Oni Temple for the last mask, the ninja are taken hostage and discover Princess Harumi’s true intentions.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Masters of Spinjitzu
programme.desc: The ninja appeal to the police commissioner of Ninjago in an effort to help save Lloyd and thwart Harumi’s efforts to resurrect the evil Lord Garmadon.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Masters of Spinjitzu
programme.desc: Just when the Ninja think they have saved the day, Lord Garmadon returns to NINJAGO, and frees Harumi, who encourages him to “achieve his true potential” by conquering the one thing that has always stood in his way… his son, Lloyd.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Masters of Spinjitzu
programme.desc: The ninja race to save Lloyd, as a more powerful-than-ever Lord Garmadon creates an enormous Colossi to help him rule NINJAGO and defeat the ninja.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Masters of Spinjitzu
programme.desc: Ninjago has become a bleak, enemy-occupied city ruled by Emperor Garmadon and his Sons of Garmadon biker gang.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Abuelo, con la ayuda de Gaspar, hace una lista de todas las cosas que quiere hacer antes de morir. Peluzin y el Noruego están adictos a un videojuego.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Abuelo y el Noruego suben de peso y Jonathan tiene problemas con un bully en la escuela.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Noruego decide ir a NY a conocer a la verdadera Ivanka pero en el camino el grupo se separa de el Abuelo y Peluzín.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Noruego aprende inglés y se prepara para vivir el sueño americano. En tanto, el Abuelo llega a un reencuentro con sus ex-compañeros de colegio y descubre una verdad sepultada por el tiempo.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Abuelo despierta la curiosidad en el Noruego por conocer a su padre y este le pide ayuda a Gaspar para que lo acompañe en esta misión que ha hecho como su única prioridad. Mientras tanto el Abuelo encamina a Jonathan en su despertar sexual.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Despúes de una ardua búsqueda el Noruego encuentra a su padre, mientras que Jonathan ayuda a Peluzín a llevar una vida de bien.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Tenta-Culo celebra su aniversario y hace una gran fiesta donde invita a todos, desafortunadamente durante el evento sucede un crimen y nadie puede salir hasta encontrar al responsable.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Noruego emprende en un nuevo negocio con pulgas, mientras que el Abuelo y Jonathan son tomados como rehenes por unos crimínales en un asalto al banco.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: La familia va a Washington a pedir la mano de Ivanka con un resultado inesperado, mientras que Johnny busca deshacer la relación enfermiza entre el Abuelo y Peluzín.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Independientemente de resultado de las elecciones norteamericanas, Donald Trump decide declarale la guerra a México y LFDB se embarca en una misión especial para derrocar al tirano Trump.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Noruego se lanza como candidato a Presidente del Condominio. Sin embargo, un oponente inesperado eclipsa sus planes en plena campaña.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Pelu el Payaso le pide a Jony que sea su nuevo ayudante e inician una gira espectacular que da muchos frutos. Mientras tanto, el Noruego descubre su afición por los tatuajes.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El calentamiento global trae consigo una mueva amenaza para la ciudad, mientras que Irma y Peluzín emprenden en un nuevo negocio, reclutando a varios amigos.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: LFDB decide hacerle una intervención al Abuelo porque está mas hostil que nunca y quieren que busque tratamiento médico, mientras que Peluzín y Jonathan ayudan a Pitipú a conseguir su nacionalidad.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Olaf se lleva una sorpresa muy desagradable al estar instalando su altar de muertos, mientras que el Abuelo se burla de Gaspar frente a toda su oficina lo que ocasiona una guerra entre ambos.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Una aparición religiosa se manifiesta en el baño del departamento y poco tardan el noruego y el abuelo en encontrarle una ventaja a esta situación.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Peluzín trata de averiguar el paradero de su madre con la ayuda de sus dos nuevos papás, mientras que Gaspar invita al Abuelo, el Noruego y Johnny a el nuevo restaurante de moda.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Irma organiza un club de peleas clandestinas, mientras que Pitipú decepcionado de sus conocimientos Bíblicos, decide embarcarse en el camino del mal.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Una oda al prototipo de familia mexicana disfuncional, con el humor y gran atributo para enfrentar cualquier situación.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Noruego se enamora de la estatua de cera de Ivanka Trump y toda la familia decide hacer un viaje y atravesar todo el país en auto hasta Nueva York.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Un incidente hace que Irma revalore su vida y desaparezca. Mientras el Abuelo y el Noruego tratan de encontrarla, Gaspar y Jonathan tratan de encontrarle su lugar a Olaf en la familia.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Abuelo se topa de manera inesperada con su Némesis de la infancia y junto con Gaspar se embarca en una cruzada para recuperar un objeto muy preciado de manos de su archienemigo.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Viendo la tele en la sala de su casa de repente el Abuelo y el Noruego son golpeados con una nueva idea para lucrar en un popular programa de TV. Mientras tanto Peluzín se aventaja de un descuido de Gaspar.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: En una parodia de La Rosa de Guadalupe, el Abuelo es encarado por su familia para tratarse su adicción al sexo, mientras que Peluzín se aprovecha de Olaf para establecer un negocio ilícito en la escuela.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El edificio Pino es desalojado por causas de fuerza mayor y todos tienen que buscar donde vivir, mientras que el Abuelo se deja caer en una espiral descendente debido a su gran ego.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Noruego busca desesperadamente una forma para recuperar su fortuna, mientras que el Abuelo se hace adicto al videojuego de moda.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Este capitulo completo es una sátira de la típica historia de telenovelas que ha puesto a México en el mapa como el mas su fuerte exponente, sin reflejar necesariamente algún estándar de calidad.

programme.title: Little Baby Bum en español
programme.desc: Little Baby Bum es un espectáculo divertido y educativo para niños que presenta canciones infantiles, clásicas y nuevas; amado por los bebés, y sus padres en todo el mundo.

programme.title: Little Angel (LAS)
programme.desc: Únete a Little Angel para divertirte a salvo. Desde "No hables con extraños" hasta "A salvo en la playa", aprende lecciones importantes mientras disfrutas del parque, de los días de playa y las melodías pegadizas.

programme.desc: The world's most wanted master thief, Lupin III is dead! Despite a coroner's report, Interpol Inspector Zenigata is skeptical and discovers that Lupin is actually alive and well and stealing! But who had set up Lupin's death and why?

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: The Woman Called Fujiko Mine
programme.desc: In the season finale, all the players have finally come together, and it's time to see how the tale ends.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 1
programme.desc: The Hida Speedway has been completed and Lupin is looking to take top prize at the first race. The race is actually a trap designed by the Scorpion Gang who are intent on killing Lupin and eliminating all criminal competition.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 1
programme.desc: Fujiko has stolen something from a man named Pycal, and he wants it back. Pycal is a magician who is able to shoot flames from his hands, walk on air, and deflect bullets with ease. Lupin goes up against Pycal in hopes of saving Fujiko.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 1
programme.desc: A boat collision ruins Lupin and Fujiko's quiet boating expedition. They discover a woman named Linda in the other boat just as gunmen on a larger boat attack them.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 1
programme.desc: Lupin and Fujiko successfully pull off a heist; that is until Zenigata manages to shoot Lupin with a tranquilizer dart. Zenigata hauls Lupin off to jail. Despite Fujiko's best efforts, she cannot break Lupin out of prison.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 1
programme.desc: With the help of some quick gunplay by his partner Jigen, Lupin takes on the world in elaborate heists, classic car chases, and nasty explosions. Fujiko, a buxom redhead with a penchant for betrayal, always gets tangled up in Lupin's capers.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 1
programme.desc: One rainy afternoon, a man seeks Lupin's help on behalf of a young woman. The woman is actually Fujiko, who is after a diamond known as "The Star of Killamanjaro". The diamond was implanted into the chest of a mob boss.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 1
programme.desc: Three scrolls contain the secret of creating a blade like the Zantetsuken. Lupin wants to steal them as a matter of family pride because his grandfather, Arsene Lupin, stole them back in the 19th century.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 1
programme.desc: Napoleon once owned a deck of fortune-telling cards that are now in the hands of a millionaire known as Mr. Gold. Lupin plans to steal them during Mr. Gold's birthday party, and Zenigata plans to stop him. Lupin succeeds in stealing the mysterious cards.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 1
programme.desc: Lupin and the gang aim to steal the blueprints for a new computer. In their way is a man skilled with the machinegun and his hit-man partner named Poon, who used to be Fujiko's partner in the past.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 1
programme.desc: Lupin and Baron Ukraine are both after the world's most skilled counterfeiter. Lupin would have no problem beating the Baron, but the Baron has hired a man called Flinch along with Fujiko and gave them instructions to kill Lupin.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 1
programme.desc: Someone is posing as Lupin and blowing up bridges, causing a lot of damage and injuries. Lupin and Jigen discover that the bomber is trying to force an armored car to travel along a route of his choosing.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 1
programme.desc: Lupin and Baron Ukraine are both after the world's most skilled counterfeiter. Lupin would have no problem beating the Baron, but the Baron has hired a man called Flinch along with Fujiko and gave them instructions to kill Lupin.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 1
programme.desc: Mamo Kyosuke claims that Lupin will disappear from the world in four days. He claims that he is a time traveler from 2874 seeking revenge. Apparently, Lupin XIII destroyed the Mamo clan on March 2874.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 1
programme.desc: Lupin and Fujiko are both after the legendary Eye of the Nile emerald. It is going to be a wedding gift presented at a wedding being held on a yacht.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 1
programme.desc: Zenigata has been invited to an international police convention in Europe; his chief wants him to go, but Zenigata does not want to since Lupin has declared that he will steal a gold bust within the next three days.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 1
programme.desc: Fujiko goads Lupin into stealing a large shipment of diamonds. Lupin takes the task despite Jigen's protest that Fujiko is playing them for fools. Of course, Jigen is right.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 1
programme.desc: Fujiko invites Lupin and the gang to a famous nightclub owned by the sexy Hoshikage Rinko. Only Goemon refuses. This was a wise move as Rinko places timebombs on Fujiko, Jigen, and Lupin.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 1
programme.desc: Smith is an art thief that is selling stolen paintings under the guise of a beauty contest. Lupin decides he wants in on the action as well, promising to steal away the treasured paintings.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 1
programme.desc: Inspector Ganimard III is the grandson of Lupin I's archnemesis. He has come to Japan as the head of security for the 1972 France Fair but also intends to restore his family's honor by arresting Lupin III.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 1
programme.desc: Someone is committing thefts under Lupin's name. Lupin follows the imposters back to their island hideout. He has apparently stumbled into a whole island of thieves.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 1
programme.desc: Rie is being held captive though she does not realize it. She believes the man holding her is a friend of her father, Ken Makita. Lupin shows up to rescue her.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 1
programme.desc: Gordon, an FBI computer specialist, is in Japan to operate a computer capable of predicting crimes and determining how to stop them. The Metropolitan Police Department hopes that this will finally help them capture Lupin.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 1
programme.desc: A disputed horde of recently discovered ancient gold coins draws the attention of Lupin and company. As the ownership of the coins is disputed, Lupin decides to settle the matter on his own by stealing them from the Dai Nippon Bank.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Bye Bye, Lady Liberty
programme.desc: Foiled repeatedly by the predictions of Interpol's supercomputer, professional looter Lupin III has settled down. A sinister secret organization and a young computer genius are thrown into the mix. And whose side is the buxom Fujiko on this time?

programme.desc: The crew watches an educational short about the wonders a home economics major can do for young women in The Home Economics Story (1951). In The Saga of the Viking Women Sea Serpent (1957), lonely Viking women set sail to rescue a group of enslaved men.

programme.title: MST3K Shorts

programme.title: La venganza de los ex

programme.title: La venganza de los ex
programme.desc: Llega a la villa un nuevo ex y viene dispuesto a la reconciliación. Rocío no está interesada en Daniel, Renata y Sargento dejan que el amor fluya, y Montse y Ernesto anuncian su noviazgo. En la fiesta, Brenda completa su venganza.

programme.title: La venganza de los ex
programme.desc: Hay un nuevo ex y quiere recuperar a su antigua pareja, pero la cita cambia los planes. Una pareja termina antes sus vacaciones y Spencer se abre con Norma. Rocío hace una visita exprés a la Master Suite. Hay una ceremonia de compromiso.

programme.title: La venganza de los ex
programme.desc: Entra de sorpresa el último ex y todos quedan en shock. La fiesta de compromiso cierra con broche de oro en la Master Suite. Unos videos le abren los ojos a varios y, en la fiesta final, recuerdan los mejores momentos de las vacaciones.

programme.title: La venganza de los ex VIP
programme.desc: El nuevo Ex sorprende entrando por la puerta trasera. Asaf arrastra su corazon por culpa de la indiferencia de Lilian, quien prueba los labios de Bryan y Alba. Ana va a la Love Suite y Aldo aprovecha para destrozar las camas. Un Ex llega acompañado.

programme.title: La venganza de los ex VIP
programme.desc: Ana recibe a su fantasma más toxico y a Fraag lo "ghostean". El sexo de reconciliacion de Asaf y Lilian dura más que su proxima pelea. Valentino y Alex gritan su amor. Valeria se despide de la Villa. Diana y Chava son la pareja del momento.

programme.title: La venganza de los ex VIP
programme.desc: Diana se asocia con sus dos amores. El deseo de Queen se cumple pero el precio a pagar por el es caro. Una Love Suite causa polemica. Asaf cae en la tentacion y Lilian elije a Bryan para vengarse. La Sala Tornado revela las mentiras de la Villa.

programme.title: La venganza de los ex VIP
programme.desc: Yasmila y Asaf están en el ojo del huracán. Valeria aprovecha los estragos y se lleva a Aldo. Asaf y Lilian terminan de nuevo. Los sentimientos de Queen hacen que Ana explote y los de Diana hacen que Chava dude. El nuevo Ex llega interrumpiendo.

programme.title: Matlock
programme.desc: Matlock takes the case of Ken Wilson, convicted of murdering his wife, whose body was never found. Recently released from prison after seven years, Wilson sets out to find his missing wife but gets arrested again.

programme.title: Matlock
programme.desc: A disappearing diary, a missing mistress and a preposterous police report pose problems for Matlock when he agrees to defend a psychiatrist, Lucas Forbes.

programme.title: Matlock
programme.desc: Matlock defends a prominent psychic, Jennifer Holtz, who foresees her boyfriend’s murder and is subsequently arrested when he is found dead and Jennifer has no alibi.

programme.title: Matlock
programme.desc: A rare-coin dealer invests his trust in Matlock when he’s accused of murdering an employee who was caught stealing valuable coins. Meanwhile, Tyler becomes disgruntled when Matlock hires another private investigator, Linda Hansfield, to work on the case.

programme.title: Matlock
programme.desc: While defending a coin dealer accused of murdering an employee, Matlock and Tyler suspect the new investigator Ben hired, Linda Hansfield, is being blackmailed by the real kIller.

programme.title: Matlock
programme.desc: A picturesque thoroughbred horse farm provides an unusual setting for murder when Ben Matlock defends a slow-witted stable hand, Tommy Jenks, accused of killing the stable owner’s daughter.

programme.title: Matlock
programme.desc: Ben Matlock defends a renowned journalist accused of murdering a beautiful international model. Matlock’s investigation is stalled when he is struck by a car and lands in the hospital with a slight case of amnesia.

programme.title: Matlock
programme.desc: Matlock believes in the innocence of a man whose brainwashed son insists he saw his father kill the leader of his cult. Ben is the only hope left for a concerned father whose son, David, has been swept into a religious cult.

programme.title: Matlock
programme.desc: A lawyer friend of Matlock’s puts his faith in the crafty attorney when his client is accused of killing a feisty priest, Father Fitzgerald.

programme.title: Matlock
programme.desc: Ben Matlock gives his assistant, Michelle Thomas, her toughest courtroom assignment... breaking down the eyewitness testimony of a former law classmate in a brutal murder case.

programme.title: Matlock
programme.desc: District Attorney Julie March matches wits with tempestuous author Cynthia Slayton, whose torrid novels are suddenly eclipsed by facts surrounding the death of her best friend.

programme.title: Matlock
programme.desc: The serenity of historic Roanoke Island is shattered when a retired career soldier attempts to prove his late brother’s death was not a hunting accident, but murder.

programme.title: Matlock
programme.desc: When Tony Morgan, a smooth-talking, seemingly perfect son, frames his mother for murder, no one even suspects his involvement. No one except Ben Matlock, who tries to prove the good boy isn’t so good after all.

programme.title: Matlock
programme.desc: Ben Matlock finds himself in an awkward situation when he joins Julie March in Baltimore to help her defend an old friend accused of murder.

programme.desc: Nico Robin finds herself trapped on the island of Tequila Wolf: a miserable land where children are forced to work as slaves. Elsewhere, Usopp tries to survive a run-in with a man-eating plant!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Zoro is held against his will by the pink-haired princess of bad vibes, Brook gets mistaken for the king of darkness, and Luffy continues to eat his way toward a reunion with Fire-Fist Ace!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Luffy and Boa arrive at Impel Down, but only thirty-three hours remain until Ace's execution. To save him, the Snake Princess must find a way to hide Luffy during her full-body search!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Time is running out on Ace, so Luffy teams up with a scoundrel who's going to pieces trying to escape Impel Down. There's no love lost between the former foes, but they'd better work together if they want to survive.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Luffy must part ways with a priceless treasure map before Buggy the Clown agrees to lead him through the bloody tangle of Blade Trees and Spike Needle Grass that make up Impel Down's Crimson Hell!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Luffy and Buggy the Clown could end up as hippo food if they aren't careful in Impel Down's Wild Beast Hell. Of course, the rubber-man might find that a better fate than dealing with the prison's putrid warden!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Luffy and his crew stumble upon a most peculiar village when they hitch a ride on a fire-breathing beetle. The natives are petrified of pirates, but they welcome the Straw Hats with open arms!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: The citizens of Little East Blue throw in a feast in honor of the Straw Hats, but when the Amigo Pirates try to capture Boss the Beetle, Luffy and his crew will have to defend their new friends.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Luffy, Zoro, and Sanji prepare to do battle on behalf of Boss the Beetle, but Captain Largo of the Amigo Pirates counters with a deadly arsenal of nets to put the Straw Hat brawlers on lock down!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Luffy kicks into Second Gear for his rematch with Largo, and Nami leads the islanders as they lay waste to the Amigo Pirates. Boss the Beetle may be safe for now, but someone sinister lurks behind the scenes.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Luffy struggles to stay a step ahead of a prison patrol made up of hungry lions and poisonous scorpions! Meanwhile, Ace spends what could be his final hours swapping stories with a pirate who hates pirates.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: While the guards struggle to squelch a violent prison uprising, Luffy and his fellow fugitives try to keep their cool in a level of Impel Down known as Starvation Hell!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Boa Hancock uses her ample assets to buy some private time for a clandestine chat with Ace. Meanwhile, Luffy needs help from a graceful friend to escape the jaws of a hungry Sphinx!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Luffy and Bon are on the verge of reaching Level 4, but they didn't count on fighting a demonic, lightning-fast, devastatingly powerful Minotaur! To defeat this beast, they'll need help from a human candle and a deranged clown!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Luffy narrowly avoids a deadly dip in the boiling pool of blood, only to find himself face to face with Warden Magellan. Meanwhile, outside the prison walls, the marine fleet prepares for Whitebeard's onslaught!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Warden Magellan is a monster of a man with a penchant for poisoning prisoners. To rescue Ace, Luffy must go toe to toe with this toxic terror, but how do you defeat a foe who's deadly to the touch?

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Luffy's daring assault on the venomous warden of Impel Down leaves him struggling to stand up, but despite the lethal poison breaking down his body, the rubber-man kicks his rescue mission into Second Gear!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: While Luffy hovers perilously on the verge of death, Bon Clay embarks on a suicidal rescue mission plagued by sub-zero temperatures and bloodthirsty wolves with a supremely savage disposition!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: No existing antidote can save Luffy from the poison coursing through his veins, yet Bon Clay refuses to give up. His final, fleeting hope is a mysterious miracle-worker rumored to have vanished into the Gates of Hell!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Bon is overjoyed to hear that Luffy is still alive, but his happiness quickly turns to shock when he learns that Ivan's agonizingly painful "Healing Hormones" will cost the rubber-man ten years of his life!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Ace is scheduled to be executed in a matter of hours, and Luffy's still hovering on the verge of death. It will take a miracle to save them both, but Bon would rather die than give up on his friend!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Luffy miraculously survived his brush with death, but he's far too weak to finish rescuing Ace. Ivan is reluctant to lend a hormonal hand to the doomed rescue mission – until he learns of Luffy's lineage!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: The quest to rescue Ace tuckers out thanks to a blast of sleeping gas! Ivan's scissor-handed sidekick puts an end to nap time, but Luffy will have to join forces with a scar-faced foe from the past if he wants to complete his mission!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Luffy's desperate attempt to rescue Ace is bolstered by two powerful new allies: the murderous Crocodile and the honorable fishman Jinbei. Meanwhile, Ivan sparks a prison riot to create a diversion for the rubber-man.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Luffy and his gang of outlaws cause a commotion on Level Four, Blackbeard's arrival leads to the release of the prison's most feared inmate, and Ace gazes upon the great blue sky for what could be the very last time!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Ivan undergoes a curvaceous transformation to better battle sadistic Sadie, the commander of the Demon Guards. Meanwhile, Blackbeard and Shiryu head for a showdown on Level 1!

programme.title: Ash vs Evil Dead
programme.desc: Ash, Pablo and Kelly, now joined by Fisher, arrive at the survivalist camp in the midst of chaos and must go to extreme measures to escape. Meanwhile, more is revealed of Ruby's mission.

programme.title: Ash vs Evil Dead
programme.desc: Ash attempts to bury the book to end the Evil, but first he must contend with other, more physical things from his past. Fisher faces a horrific change in Ash.

programme.title: Ash vs Evil Dead
programme.desc: Ash battles someone all too familiar, and later hears a message from the Necronomicon. Meanwhile, the deadliest Deadite attacks.

programme.title: Ash vs Evil Dead
programme.desc: In a monumental, last-ditch attempt to rid the world of the Evil, Ash wages war against a Dark One. As the battle rages on, Ash is offered a deal that could completely change his life.

programme.title: Sanctuary
programme.desc: Investigating the disappearance of an old college friend, Will (ROBIN DUNNE) finds himself caught in an underground fight club where the combatants are genetically engineered abnormals who fight to the death like modern-day gladiators.

programme.title: Sanctuary
programme.desc: Magnus (AMANDA TAPPING) and the Sanctuary team attempt to capture a rare and deadly creature - all under the watchful eye of a local news crew.

programme.title: Sanctuary
programme.desc: Abnormals in remote regions are subjected to an airborne biological agent that compels them to launch a violent string of murders.

programme.title: Sanctuary
programme.desc: In the season finale of Sanctuary, The Five, led by Magnus (AMANDA TAPPING), attempt to find the secret labyrinth in the decimated city of Bhalasaam.

programme.title: Earth: Final Conflict
programme.desc: Da'an (Leni Parker) is held for ransom by a group of renegade soldiers who claim the Taelons sacrificed their unit during radical bioengineering experiments.

programme.title: Earth: Final Conflict
programme.desc: The resistance does battle with an alien probe that may be studying Earth.

programme.title: Earth: Final Conflict
programme.desc: Sandoval (Von Flores) reunites with his wife when the implant in his brain degenerates, setting him free from Taelon mind control but endangering his life.

programme.title: Earth: Final Conflict
programme.desc: An ancient Taelon grave in Ireland reveals that the Taelons had been planning Earth's occupation for centuries.

programme.title: Earth: Final Conflict
programme.desc: A Taelon experiment to create a new hybrid warrior ends in disaster when an ancient alien evil is brought to Earth.

programme.title: Gene Roddenberry's Andromeda
programme.desc: The Abyss has infected Beka. The crew must find a way to save her.

programme.title: Gene Roddenberry's Andromeda
programme.desc: After some of the crew is captured, Harper is forced to work on a time bridge for the Patriarch.

programme.title: An Unexpected Killer
programme.desc: A divorced mother of three is stabbed to death while recovering from major surgery, but police are frustrated by a lack of evidence, until a startling admission reignites the case.

programme.title: An Unexpected Killer
programme.desc: When a young woman who was just starting out in life is found assaulted and stabbed to death in her boyfriend's home, detectives work tirelessly to uncover a killer who had previously been above suspicion, leaving the town and police force stunned.

programme.title: An Unexpected Killer
programme.desc: Police searching for the killer of a beloved grandfather find the murderer close to home wielding a shocking weapon.

programme.title: An Unexpected Killer
programme.desc: A young woman is killed in her bedroom, and the evidence appears to point to a clear suspect, but it takes 30 years and new evidence to reveal a killer hiding in plain sight.

programme.title: An Unexpected Killer
programme.desc: A glamorous 85-year-old millionaire is found stabbed in her basement, sending police on an international investigation that unearths devilish secrets, double lives and a killer no one saw coming.

programme.title: An Unexpected Killer
programme.desc: When a beloved elderly woman is viciously murdered, detectives discover a chilling connection to another unsolved murder; the trail points to someone from her past and investigators race to hunt the killer down before they can strike again.

programme.title: An Unexpected Killer
programme.desc: After the burned body of a young nursing student is discovered near a rural road, detectives investigate several suspects until the trail of evidence unearths a disturbing and predatory plot.

programme.title: An Unexpected Killer
programme.desc: When an athletic and popular college student is violently murdered in her apartment, police track down several surprising suspects, including one with a disturbing obsession, before crucial evidence unmasks a dangerous predator no one saw coming.

programme.title: An Unexpected Killer
programme.desc: A fun-loving 59-year-old man is found shot to death in his home and his beloved jewelry collection has been stolen, leading detectives to a long list of suspects and a killer harboring a dark secret.

programme.title: An Unexpected Killer
programme.desc: A restaurant is robbed and the night manager murdered, leading police to investigate suspicious co-workers, a disgruntled ex-employee and a violent serial attacker.

programme.title: An Unexpected Killer
programme.desc: Detectives investigate a secret affair, a kidnapping plot and a racist gang when a young husband-to-be is found shot and stabbed.

programme.title: An Unexpected Killer
programme.desc: When a devoted mother is stabbed to death in a horrifying attack, suspicion falls on those closest to her; a cryptic note and a violent crime spree baffle detectives at first, but they eventually track down a deranged killer no one predicted.

programme.title: An Unexpected Killer
programme.desc: A vibrant young mother of three is murdered in the safety of her own home and investigators look to a history of troubled romances, but when the case goes cold and police can't find the killer, a phone call leads to a culprit hiding in plain sight.

programme.title: An Unexpected Killer
programme.desc: An assassination, a bitter custody dispute and a gunman's cryptic words send police scrambling on an interstate hunt to find the killer of a beloved father and husband.

programme.title: An Unexpected Killer
programme.desc: When the strangling death of a young mother and bride-to-be baffles police, detectives probe a workplace grievance in search of a killer, before a cherished possession provides a link to the crime and cracks the case wide open.

programme.title: An Unexpected Killer
programme.desc: A wealthy trader and father of four is gunned-down at home while his family is tied up in a closet; police dig into affairs, mob links and a missing co-worker, until a new lead and a taped phone call reveal a plot decades later.

programme.title: PAW Patrol
programme.desc: Marshal gets a new BFF when a gosling he names "Fuzzy" takes a liking to him. /When Mayor Goodway accidentally takes off in a hot air balloon, Ryder and the Paw Patrol must make a dramatic rescue to save her and win the race!

programme.desc: Ryder and the PAW Patrol need to rescue Alex on Jakes mountain./The pups find strange footprints in the snow on the mountain outside Adventure Bay. Everyone thinks it's a "snow monster" and it's scaring the skiers away.

programme.desc: Ryder gets a call from the Circus ringmaster - Ellie the baby elephant has escaped from the circus train! /Mayor Goodway's purse chicken "Chickaletta" has gone missing. Ryder and the Paw Patrol search Adventure bay.

programme.title: PAW Patrol
programme.desc: Ryder and the PAW Patrol have to rescue Alex when he takes off on his new "super trike"./Marshall proves he is a true hero when he stops to put out a real fire on the beach during a race against the clock for a trophy.

programme.title: PAW Patrol
programme.desc: Mr. Porters van full of puppy food slides on the ice near the shore; Ryder and the PAW Patrol must save the day!/Katie and her cat Cali are on the chair lift when it stops leaving them above the ski hill with no way to get down!

programme.title: PAW Patrol
programme.desc: It's Halloween! Capt'n Turbot has decorated an old wreck as a pirate ship for a town party. When the ship mysteriously heads out to sea captained by a "ghost" Ryder and the Paw Patrol must save the ship and discover the ghost!

programme.title: PAW Patrol
programme.desc: When Santa's Sleigh crashes and the reindeer run off - Ryder and the PAW PATROL have to help Santa finish delivering presents and save Christmas!

programme.title: PAW Patrol
programme.desc: We see a flashback of how Rubble became a member of the Paw Patrol!/When Wally the Walrus gets tangled in an old fishing net, Ryder and the Paw Patrol need to get him to the surface and back to shore safely.

programme.title: PAW Patrol

programme.desc: Ryder and the PAW Patrol clean up a small oil spill in the water near Adventure Bay. /When Adventure Bay's famous statue ends up at the bottom of the Bay, Ryder and the PAW Patrol have to help Mayor Goodway bring it back!

programme.desc: A woman who only discovered she was adopted at the age of eleven searches for her mother. Then, a son's search for his father, who he longs to have standing by his side when he marries in one week.

programme.title: Long Lost Family (UK)
programme.desc: Two stories of missing mothers stretching back over 50 years. A grandfather, who after 20 years of searching for his birth mother, is running out of time; and a woman looking for the mother who disappeared when she was a toddler.

programme.title: Long Lost Family (UK)
programme.desc: A woman desperate to find her older sister, whom she has never met, and a daughter longing to be reunited with her father, who she last saw when she was just five years old.

programme.title: Long Lost Family (UK)
programme.desc: This episode features two stories of babies given up for adoption by their mothers. A man, who's spent over a decade searching for his mother and a woman, who's spent her entire life needing to make amends.

programme.title: Long Lost Family (UK)
programme.desc: The story of a woman desperate plea for a second chance with the baby she gave up for adoption nearly fifty years ago and a sister searching for her brother, who mysteriously disappeared forty years ago.

programme.title: Finding Your Roots
programme.desc: Host Henry Louis Gates, Jr. shows journalists Christiane Amanpour, Ann Curry and Lisa Ling that the stories within their own family trees are every bit as compelling as the news stories they have been covering for the world.

programme.title: Finding Your Roots
programme.desc: Learn about the ancestors of three celebrated Americans who not only share a Jewish heritage, but also history of perseverance. Featuring Tony Kushner, Carole King, and Alan Dershowitz.

programme.title: Finding Your Roots
programme.desc: Kevin Bacon and Kyra Sedgwick are both famous actors and both descend from prominent American families that have been in this country since its inception. They both have ancestors who were early opponents of slavery.

programme.title: Finding Your Roots
programme.desc: Samuel L. Jackson, Condoleezza Rice and Brown University president, Ruth Simmons, have each climbed to the pinnacle of their profession, yet each started life as a second-class citizen in the Jim Crow south.

programme.title: Transformers: Age of Extinction

programme.title: Transformers

programme.title: Simply Ming
programme.desc: From Portsmouth, NH, chef Matt Louis cooks Goat Meatballs, while Ming counters with Surf-n-Turf Meatballs.

programme.title: Simply Ming

programme.title: Dynasties: Families That Made the 20th Century
programme.desc: Fame can break down barriers. It can transcend culture and race. Death is never the end, so long as there is money to be made. This episode explores famous dynasties who have brought political and social change.

programme.title: Dynasties: Families That Made the 20th Century
programme.desc: Kennedy, Kim, Bhutto and Gandhi-Nehru are just a few of the political dynasties that have been at the forefront of generations of war and revolution. However, having a revered name does not guarantee the survival of an individual.

programme.title: Dynasties: Families That Made the 20th Century
programme.desc: From coronations to threats of assassinations, to coups and abdications, imperial dynasties have survived it all. Each generation leaves their mark as either a pawn or political powerhouse.

programme.title: The Khufu Pyramid Revealed
programme.desc: The Great Pyramids are the only wonders of the ancient world that still stand today, the greatest of which is the pyramid of Khufu. Many theories have been offered to explain its construction, but none as convincing or unique as this one.

programme.title: Celts: The Untold Story
programme.desc: A journey to some of the mysteries of how the early Celts emerged and expanded.

programme.title: Celts: The Untold Story
programme.desc: After thriving as traders for centuries, the Celts reinvented themselves as fearless warriors.

programme.title: Celts: The Untold Story
programme.desc: In the 2nd Century BC, Celtic tribes established prosperous cities dedicated to trade.

programme.title: Legends of King Arthur
programme.desc: Never has there been a figure so magnetically attractive as the archetypal hero King Arthur. What is so special about this mysterious king?

programme.title: Legends of King Arthur
programme.desc: Legend has it that Arthur set up court to rule from Camelot. But is it just the link with Arthur that draws us to Camelot, or is there something more?

programme.title: Legends of King Arthur
programme.desc: Merlin is linked in our minds to King Arthur, who could not rule without the wizard to advise him. Yet until the 12th century, they existed in folktales as separate characters.

programme.title: 101 Events That Made the 20th Century
programme.desc: From the coronation of the enduring British monarch Queen Elizabeth II, to the rise of Iranian dictator Khomeini, Episode One counts down 101-89 events.

programme.title: 101 Events That Made the 20th Century
programme.desc: In Episode Two we countdown from 88 to 74 events that have shaped and influenced thought, marked wars, changed fashion, and rebuilt economies.

programme.title: 101 Events That Made the 20th Century
programme.desc: Counting down from 75 to 63 we showcase great works of art and scientific feats in space, civil wars, sieges and environmental crises.

programme.title: Anaconda

programme.title: Los herederos del monte

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Morticia and Gomez visit Mayor Henson to complain that their property tax is ridiculously low. After the Mayor proves his incompetence by offering a refund, Gomez is persuaded to become a candidate for the office.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: During a welcome home party for Cousin Itt, Morticia notices that the diminutive guest of honor seems to be losing his hair. Uncle Fester experiments with his chemistry set to produce a concoction that grows hair and tries the remedy on Itt.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Wednesday and Pugsley return in tears from trick-or-treating because a neighbor has told them there is no such thing as a witch. Morticia and Gomez plan to prove to the children that they do exist--by summoning a witch to a séance.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Determined to correct the dreadful literature that Wednesday and Pugsley are exposed to, Morticia sets out to create a new literary world. Gomez fears that his wife's first manuscript is so good, that once the publisher reads it he will lose her.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: In need of artistic fulfillment, Morticia takes up sculpting. An art critic views her first endeavor--a three-eyed Gomez statue--and clubs it with his cane. Gomez, who won't have Morticia's heart broken gets a seedy art dealer to buy it.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Pugsley copies one of his dad's old love letters and sends it to his teacher. Miss Dunbar comes to visit the Addams home and confesses to Gomez that no man has ever fallen so in love with her, leading Morticia to pretend to be the jealous wife.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: After Wednesday befriends a new boy her age, Robespierre Courtney, Morticia invites his parents, Mr. and Mrs. Henry Courtney to visit the Addams house for tea. Unbeknownst to them, the Courtney's are hoping to meet a number of the social set.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: There is a neighborhood burglar on the loose, and Morticia has reason to believe it could be Gomez. Morticia decides to probe his subconscious mind for a key to his criminality after she and Uncle Fester discover loot hidden in the storeroom.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Morticia's pet plant Cleopatra gobbles up her favorite photo of Gomez from the family album. When the original photographer is found and asked to make a duplicate picture, it is discovered that he is now with the Department of Motor Vehicles.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Gomez plays host to Don Xavier Molines, a family friend during his childhood in Spain, and his daughter Consuella. Morticia's hospitality is put to the test when Consuella reveals that she has been promised in marriage to Gomez since childhood.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: When Wednesday's and Pugsley's faith in Santa Claus is shaken, Uncle Fester is chosen to back up Santa in case the real St. Nick is too busy to come. However, Fester-Santa gets stuck in the chimney, so each of the other adults fills in for him.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Fester is so smitten upon receipt of a photo of his love, a bearded carnival lady, that he borrows stamp money to mail her a proposal. Morticia dons a beard and poses as the mother to convince Fester that he will have to work to support a wife.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Because she thinks Fester (Jackie Coogan) and Grandmama (Blossom Rock) are spoiling the children, Morticia (Carolyn Jones) hires a governess. Insulted, Fester paints a white line down the center of the Addams house, dividing it in half.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Morticia and Gomez see Fester conferring with TV muscleman Jack LaGrann (Jack LaLanne), and think that Fester is planning a television career. However, Uncle Fester confides to Lurch that he has to go on a secret diet and exercise.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Morticia and Gomez find Grandfather Pegleg's treasure map and summon Captain Grimby. They hope to charter his boat for the treasure hunt. But after meeting the Captain, Morticia is careful to keep the nature of the mission secret.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Ophelia Frump is madly in love with Horatio Bartholomew, the man who has everything, except the truth about her relatives. Morticia, not convinced by Bartholomew, persuades playboy Cousin Itt to stir the embers of his past romance with Ophelia.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Pugsley shocks his parents when he gives up his new atomic reactor as kid stuff and announces that he wants to find his own job. His first try is as a medical assistant to Dr. Bird. He turns up, scalpel in hand, ready to help during an operation.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Grandma Frump (guest star Margaret Hamilton), comes to the mistaken conclusion that her daughter, Morticia (Carolyn Jones), and Gomez (John Astin) plan to pack her off to an old folks home. Actually, they plan to send her to a beauty farm.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Morticia, in order to be part of the National Beautification Program, decides to become a home decorator and offers her services to the neighbors. Next door neighbor, and insurance agent, Joe Digby hires Morticia in hopes of selling them insurance.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Ophelia taunts Uncle Fester into announcing that he is going to join the Peace Corps. Fester feels he's a cinch to be accepted because Gomez plans to pull strings in Washington on his behalf. The entire family agrees to help him study for the exam.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Allyn Joslyn guest-stars as Sam Hilliard, a former truant officer who now heads a private school where Wednesday and Pugsley are enrolled. When Hilliard breaks under the strain of dealing with the Addams children, Gomez buys the school.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Dr. Marvin P. Gunderson is summoned to examine Kitty Kat, the ailing lion pet of the Addams Family. Morticia decides that it is the doctor who needs help. To build his confidence, human members of the family pretend to be ill so he can effect cures.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Morticia's concern that Lurch is overworked leads Gomez to the operating table to assemble a custom-built secondary butler. Lurch lets the robot do all the work and then begins to feel that he isn't needed anymore.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: When Uncle Fester incinerates the family's stuffed bear with his flamethrower, Morticia reports the accident to the insurance company. Mr. Henson the head of the company, sends his assistant, Mr. Digby, to handle the case.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Lurch suffers from unrequited love over Tiny Trivia (guest star Diane Jergens), Morticia's visiting school chum who only has eyes for show business. The entire family decides to try to turn their stolid butler into a new personality.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: When Ophelia laments that she has been jilted, Morticia suggests a career as an alternative to marriage. She tries chemistry first (with explosive results) then turns to operatic singing. Cousin Itt is summoned to coach her to stardom.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Morticia and Gomez decide to keep Wednesday and Pugsley home from school after Morticia sees the fairy tales they have to read. When the truant officer comes to investigate, he is shocked at what he finds.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: Teams in Paris, France, must whip up some tasty treats and make enough Chantilly cream for four pies, as well as compete in a series of carnival games.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: Teams reach new heights in Berlin, as they walk face-first down the exterior of a building for nearly 200 feet.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: Teams travel to Almaty, Kazakhstan, where they brave the cold weather while perfecting a choreographed fight scene and decorate a yurt.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: Teams race through Hyderabad, India, where they must complete double the detours, double the road blocks and travel double the distance.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: The first ever mega leg in race history continues through Hyderabad, India, where teams compete in double the detours and double the road blocks, and travel double the distance.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: The final five teams race through Siem Reap, Cambodia, where they face the second and final double U-turn of the season.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: In the first city sprint, the final four teams race through Manila, the capital of the Philippines, where they have no road blocks and no detours.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: With the $1 million prize on the line, the final three teams travel to New Orleans, where one team is crowned the winner.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: The Amazing Race begins its historic 33rd trip around the world when 11 new teams take off from their homes and travel to their first destination, London, England.

programme.desc: The Amazing Race begins its historic 33rd trip around the world when 11 new teams take off from their homes and travel to their first destination, London, England.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: While racing through Scotland in February 2020, teams receive shocking and unprecedented news - for the first time in the show's history, THE AMAZING RACE suspends production due to the COVID-19 pandemic.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: Host Phil Keoghan gathers the teams in Switzerland to restart the Race nearly 20 months after production was suspended for the.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: Teams race through Switzerland, where Racers bungee jump over 700 feet off the Verzasca Dam.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: Racers travel by private jet to Corsica, France, where they go canyoneering through the beautiful landscape of natural rockslides, waterfalls, and rivers.

programme.desc: Helen Crump and her students convince a crotchety old school principal that today's youngsters aren't so different from his own generation.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Wild Countdown

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Wild Countdown
programme.desc: Jungle Jack explores villages that are way off the beaten path to meet the people who live there and the animals that surround them, like cheetahs in South Africa, spider monkeys in the Amazon, hippos along the Zambezi, lions in Kenya and more!

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Wild Countdown
programme.desc: Join Jungle Jack for a journey into the Danger Zone. He’s coming face-to-face with a deadly bushmaster, visiting mountain lions in close quarters, crossing paths with a grumpy elephant, climbing into a cave filled with bats, and more!

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Into the Wild
programme.desc: Jack is headed to South Africa to explore one of the most ground-breaking reserves on the continent – Shamwari. What once was old farming land, is now a meticulously restored eco-system brimming with wildlife and adventure.

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Into the Wild
programme.desc: Deep in the Amazon River basin of Peru, Jack discovers a group of young conservationists working to save orphaned and injured animals at Taricaya Rescue Center.

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Into the Wild
programme.desc: Jack heads into South Africa's Zululand for an adventure with Cheetah, Rhino, Dung Beetles, and the Nyala antelope. Then he is welcomed into a Zulu tribe, with his daughter Kathaleen.

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Into the Wild
programme.desc: Jungle Jack's taking a Jungle Cruise through the Amazon as he searches for elusive pink river dolphins. But, along the way, Jack gets a lot more than he bargained for… from a sloth to giant river otters and even anacondas!

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Wild Countdown: Jungle Critters
programme.desc: Come along with Jungle Jack as he uncovers creatures living in the deep, dark jungle. Elusive reptiles like pythons and caimans, river-dwellers like piranha and Amazonian manatees and massive primates like lowland gorillas.

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Animal Adventures
programme.desc: Jack visits the world's largest crocodile farm and assists in the capture of a 14-foot reptilian destined for a Thailand education center.

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Wild Countdown: Helping Hands
programme.desc: Jungle Jack is counting down animals that count on us! Baboons crossing the road in South Africa, dogs getting vaccinated in Botswana, orphans getting nursed back to health in Panama…it’s six stories about lending a helping hand.

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Into the Wild
programme.desc: Jack and his family meet a seldom-seen monotreme – the platypus, help veterinarians at a groundbreaking hospital and walk up to wild emus. Of course, no trip to Australia is complete without seeing some kangaroos!

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Wild Countdown: Life in the Slow Lane
programme.desc: Today’s countdown is all about animals that know how to take it easy, from mellow mammals like manatees and koalas to relaxed reptiles like the giant Galapagos tortoise. Kick back, relax and take a ride in the slow lane!

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Into the Wild
programme.desc: Jack, Suzi, and Kathaleen explore Phinda Game Reserve in South Africa alongside Lions, Hippos, Rhinos, and more!

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Into the Wild

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Animal Adventures
programme.desc: In the chilly waters of Shark Alley near the tip of South Africa, Jack seeks out the fearsome great white shark. Submerged in a metal cage, Jack's encounter with a 14-foot great white is the experience of a lifetime.

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Wild Countdown: Help Wanted
programme.desc: There’s no job too big or small for Jungle Jack as he gets to work as a horse farrier, baboon crossing guard, beekeeper and more!

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Into the Wild
programme.desc: Join Jungle Jack on a whale-watching safari to Catalina Island where he meets a Humpback Whale, Fin Whale, loads of Dolphins, California Sea Lions, and more!

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Wild Countdown: Horses
programme.desc: Join Jack as he’s counting down ten amazing equine experiences! From a horseback safari in Botswana and a dude ranch in Montana to retirement home for horses in Florida, Jack is saddling up for ten incredible horse encounters.

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Animal Adventures
programme.desc: At the Serra Canastra National Park, near the town of Sao Roque de Minas, Jack sets off in search of Brazil's Giant Anteater. Jack also visits the humble beginnings of Rio Zoo Francisco, the country's longest river.

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Into the Wild
programme.desc: The Atacama Desert in northern Chile is known as the highest and driest desert in the world. Jack wants to explore it all-from colorful flamingos to rare cats and even a newly discovered species.

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Wild Countdown

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Animal Adventures

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Wild Countdown
programme.desc: Meet six exotic species and the habitats they call home sweet home. Corals in Curacao, Galapagos marine iguanas, Borneo’s orangutans, Tasmanian devils, mountain gorillas in Rwanda and more!

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Sometimes, the cause of death does not match the scene of the crime. When an untraceable poison is used to commit murder, homicide detectives turn to forensic toxicologists to follow a killer's tracks and expose a toxic death.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Lies and deceit can often throw investigators off the trail of justice. But when hard evidence contradicts a killer's story, police must use the clues to piece together the truth.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Some people will let nothing stand between them and their goals. In their tortured minds, raw desire replaces all reason, and homicide becomes a convenient means to an end.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: A millionaire is found dead, murdered for a stash of buried silver. A young woman dates violent men, only to be killed by her best friend.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: A southeastern Virginia community is stunned by a crime no one can believe. A pregnant woman murdered, her baby lost. Across the state, another town feels a similar shock, a brutal, random slaying in a most unexpected setting.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: The solution to the most heinous crimes often hinge on the smallest of clues. Investigators must have their eyes trained to find the full story of a murder written in a single scrap of evidence.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Poisoners are the most devious of killers, relying on stealth or their victim's trust in order to steal their lives. They're the most dangerous creatures in the world: smart assassins. And they usually don't stop at one kill.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Accidental deaths, suicides, disappearances, and fires; they're an everyday part of an insurance investigator's life. But cases shouldn't be taken at face value. Forensics has become a tool for exposing insurance fraud.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Some killers choose to hide their victims – And investigators must then rely on forensic examiners to uncover proof of murder – These are just two extraordinary crimes that have made their way into the medical examiner's casebook.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: A killer may strike in the middle of the night, and hide clues well. But the police are always there, ready and working, and they will never give up when they're on the trail of criminals who decide it's Killing Time.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Forensics in the O.J. Simpson Murder Trial: Millions watched on television as the jury rendered their verdict. Orenthal James Simpson was found not guilty of murder.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Solving crimes may begin with gut intuition, but advanced science provides investigators with irrefutable proof. When criminals go to great lengths to mask their crimes, Investigators must step up the challenge and remain forever …undaunted.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Forensic Botany & Geology: Plants help provide oxygen and nutrients for existence. Soil is the fertilizer of life. Yet both can yield clues to the time and location of a person's death.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Sometimes the scales of justice are balanced by just a few milligrams of evidence – a couple of fibers, a tooth filling, or a smudge on a piece of tape. The biggest cases are often solved by the smallest clues.

programme.title: Matthew Saad Muhammad vs Yaqui Lopez 1

programme.title: Miguel Cotto vs Antonio Margarito 2
programme.desc: On December 3rd, 2011, Miguel Cotto fought Antonio Margarito in a highly anticipated championship rematch at the Madison Square Garden in New York. This time around, Cotto showed his dominance from the start and stopped Margarito in the 9th round.

programme.title: Miguel Cotto vs Muhammad Abdullaev
programme.desc: On June 11th, 2005 Miguel Cotto faced Muhammad Abdullaev for the WBO World Super Lightweight title at Madison Square Garden in New York the twelve round bout ended in the ninth securing the victory for Cotto.

programme.title: Miguel Cotto vs Ricardo Mayorga
programme.desc: On March 12th, 2011, Miguel Cotto fought Ricardo Mayorga for the World Super Welterweight Championship at the MGM Grand in Las Vegas. In a great fight, Miguel Cotto prevailed, knocking down Mayorga in the final round and getting the stoppage.

programme.title: Muhammad Ali vs. Joe Frazier 2
programme.desc: On January 28th, 1974 Muhammad Ali and Joe Frazier face eachother for a second time at Madison Square Garden in New York for North American Boxing Federation Heavyweight titles resulting in a strong win for Ali.

programme.title: Oscar De La Hoya vs Jeff Mayweather
programme.desc: On March 13th, 1993 Oscar De La Hoya and Jeff Mayweather faced eachother at the Hilton Hotel in Las Vegas in an 8 round bout then ended by technical knockout in the fourth round securing the victory for De la Hoya.

programme.title: Shane Mosley vs Oscar De La Hoya 2
programme.desc: On September 13th, 2003 Shane Mosley and Oscar De La Hoya battled for a second time for the IBA, WBA and, WBC Super welterweight titles at the MGM Grand in Las Vegas in a bout that lasted 12 rounds continuing the reign of Mosley securing his win.

programme.title: Sugar Ray Leonard vs Davey Boy Green
programme.desc: On March 31st, 1980 Sugar Ray Leonard fought Davey Boy Green for the WBC World Welterweight titles at the Capitol Center in Landover in a bout that went 4 out of 15 rounds ending with a knockout victory for Leonard.

programme.title: Sugar Ray Leonard vs Marvin Hagler
programme.desc: On April 6th, 1987 Sugar Ray Leonard fought Marvin Hagler for the WBC World Middleweight title at Caesars Palace in Las Vegas in a twelve round bout that resulted in a split decision in favor of Leonard.

programme.title: Teofimo Lopez vs Vasiliy Lomachenko
programme.desc: On October 17th, 2020 Teofimo Lopez and Vasiliy Lomachenko battled for IBF, WBA and WBO World Lightweight title in The Bubble at MGM Grand in Las Vegas in a 12 round bout that ended in victory for Lopez.

programme.title: Timothy Bradley Jr vs Ruslan Provodnikov
programme.desc: On March 16th, 2013, Timothy Bradley fought Ruslan Provodnikov for the WBO Welterweight Title in Carson, California. Provodnikov put up a very strong challenge in an incredible fight, but Bradley prevailed, earning a unanimous decision victory.

programme.title: Todd Foster vs Jeff Mayweather
programme.desc: On August 6th, 1992 Todd Foster fought Jeff Mayweather at Denton Field in Miles City with Mayweather going down in rounds 7 & 8 the bout resulted in a technical knockout victory for Foster.

programme.title: Tyson Fury vs Deontay Wilder 3
programme.desc: On October 9th, 2021, Tyson Fury fought Deontay Wilder in their third and final matchup against each other at T-Mobile Arena in Las Vegas. In a thrilling fight, Fury once again proved his dominance, defeating Wilder by an 11th-round TKO.

programme.title: Tyson Fury vs Dillian Whyte
programme.desc: On April 23rd, 2022 Tyson Fury fought Dillian Whyte for the WBC World Heavyweight title at Wembley Stadium Whyte suffered injuries throughout the fight causing the fight to end by technical knockout in the 4th round giving the bout to Fury.

programme.title: Tyson Fury vs Tom Schwarz
programme.desc: On June 15th, 2019 Tyson Fury went up against Tom Schwarz for the WBO Intercontinental Heavyweight title at the MGM Grand in Las Vegas in a bout that lasted two rounds ending by technical knockout securing Fury's win.

programme.title: Transformers: Original Series
programme.desc: When the Decepticons install a powerful artifact from their ancient space vessel into Megatron, he becomes all-powerful. The Autobots shrink Bumblebee, Brawn, and Perceptor, so they can journey inside Megatron and remove the powerful “Heart of Cybertron.”

programme.title: Transformers: Beast Machines

programme.title: Transformers: Beast Machines

programme.title: Transformers: Beast Machines

programme.title: Transformers: Beast Machines

programme.desc: Drita joins Ang and Renee in Philadelphia for a party thrown by Alicia DiMichelle Garofalo, wife of alleged wise guy Eddie 'Tall Guy' Garofalo. Renee hires a new face to model for her line, sexy spit-fire Natalie Guerico.

programme.title: Mob Wives
programme.desc: New blood boils over as Natalie is fuming over Drita talking behind her back at Renee's fashion show. Tensions run high as the fiery South Philly beauty confronts Drita and doesn't back down.

programme.title: Basketball Wives
programme.desc: Duffey kicks off her birthday by inviting the ladies to her final performance in Vegas, but needs to reconcile with Angel. Brandi has to make a life-changing decision about her health. Brooke needs her kids approval before beginning her IVF journey.

programme.title: Basketball Wives
programme.desc: On the Vegas trip tensions boil over as Nia attempts to apologize to Angel, but the other ladies aren't convinced she is sincere. Duffey plays her last DJ set, but has second thoughts about ending her career for good.

programme.title: Basketball Wives
programme.desc: Malaysia and Brandi try to mend their friendship, but Brandi is still hesitant. While producing her first track, Duffey disagrees with Iman over her decision to continue DJing. The ladies go head-to-head at a basketball game soiree.

programme.title: Basketball Wives
programme.desc: Jackie advances into her acting career and lands a movie role while Angel struggles with her high-risk pregnancy. Jen hosts an event to launch her luxury hair line, but Malaysia brings a guest that threatens her relationship with the other women.

programme.title: Basketball Wives
programme.desc: Jackie tries to uplift the ladies' spirits with a secret, surprise trip. Jen ponders the next step in her relationship with Jelani, and Brooke's plans for IVF take a turn. Meanwhile, Brittish reveals life changing news that may jeopardize her future.

programme.title: WOW - Women of Wrestling: The Next Generation
programme.desc: It's finally time for Samantha Smart and The Classmaster to collect on the deal they made with Matchmaker David McLane for the main event with a WOW World Championship match against The Beast.

programme.title: WOW - Women of Wrestling: The Next Generation
programme.desc: The WOW roster is reeling from last week's news and the videotape delivered from The Beast when Matchmaker David McLane announces a 12-Woman Battle Royale to crown a new champion.

programme.title: WOW - Women of Wrestling: The Next Generation
programme.desc: New tag team champions Big Rig Betty and Jessie Jones celebrate their title reign to kick off an episode full of qualifying matches for the upcoming over-the-top-rope Battle Royal for the WOW World Championship.

programme.title: WOW - Women of Wrestling: The Next Generation
programme.desc: The WOW Battle Royal for the World Championship approaches as the Superheroes continue to vie to qualify, including Genesis, who faces new Superhero Ashley Blaze. Meanwhile, Xena Phoenix looks forward to continuing her strong start in WOW.

programme.title: WOW - Women of Wrestling: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Backed by Alliance members Adriana Gambino, BK Rhythm and Gigi Gianni, Reina Del Rey is on a mission to expand the Alliance's hold over WOW with a victory over Foxxy Fierce - and she's vowed to take no prisoners on the roster.

programme.title: WOW - Women of Wrestling: The Next Generation
programme.desc: On the heels of their victory last week, Miami Sweet Heat demands a rematch for the WOW Tag Team Championships as other Superheroes continue to focus on qualifying for the upcoming Battle Royal.

programme.title: WOW - Women of Wrestling: The Next Generation
programme.desc: After Miami Sweet Heat's Lindsey and Laurie Carlson and Animal Instinct's Goldie Collins and Katarina Jinx both called "next" on the WOW Tag Team Championships last week, the main event sees a triple confrontation with both teams.

programme.title: WOW - Women of Wrestling: The Next Generation
programme.desc: The qualifying matches are over, and twelve competitors are finally ready to compete in the over-the-top-rope Battle Royal for the WOW World Championship vacated by The Beast. Who will be the last woman standing and NEW WOW World Champion?

programme.title: WOW - Women of Wrestling: The Next Generation
programme.desc: It's the beginning of a new reign in WOW as new WOW World Champion The Classmaster, accompanied by the IQ Superior Samantha Smart, celebrates The Classmaster victory in last week's Championship Battle Royal.

programme.title: WOW - Women of Wrestling: The Next Generation
programme.desc: All eyes - and one team's mouths - are on the main event - as a Dog Food Match between Animal Instinct and Big Rig Betty and Jessie Jones takes place. The loser will be forced to eat dog food!

programme.title: WOW - Women of Wrestling: The Next Generation
programme.desc: The Las Vegas VIP Abilene Maverick wants one thing and one thing only - and it's the WOW World Championship for her bestie, reality TV star Paola Mayfield! And, in the Main Event, The Classmaster defends her WOW World Championship for the first time.

programme.title: WOW - Women of Wrestling: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Genesis remains in the championship title hunt and her challenge could be the toughest of all when she battles the Albanian Grappler, Xena Phoenix. In the Main Event, Miami's Sweet Heat, Lindsey and Laurie Carlson continue to seek to up their win record.

programme.title: WOW - Women of Wrestling: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Mad angry from the outcome of the dog food match, Big Rig Betty and Jessie Jones look to get even with Animal Instinct, with a stipulation that Goldie Collins and Katarina Jinx can't weasel out of - a No DQ, Dog Collar match in the main event!

programme.title: WOW - Women of Wrestling: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Tag Team competition heats up. Princess Aussie and Tormenta battle 4 times tag team champions Miami Sweet Heat to start this start episode in WOW - Women Of Wrestling.

programme.desc: A sadistic pair of killers escape from prison who have no qualms about killing.

programme.desc: On Christmas, Eve Randall receives his most daunting assignment yet from a young boy who has eight cents to pay: bring in Santa Claus.
